description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 12 times.
Summons 5 homing arrow that tracks enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal additional Physical DMG to the enemy.

Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line based on their remaining HP and knocks them down. This skill applies an additional [500->800] Physical Defense Penetration, and against Bosses, deals additional Physical DMG.

After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK and Critical Hit Chance by [100->80] for [5 sec.->7sec]. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows, each dealing 143% ATK Physical DMG.

dark.unified: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for [0.6 sec.->0.5 sec.]

light.unified: Attack Speed increases by [8%->5%] per stack.

dark.unified: Damage dealt to bosses increases by 5% per stack. [(removed) At the start of battle, Attack is increased by 10%. This Attack increase stacks up to 10 times, and at 10 stacks, damage dealt to bosses is increased by 20%]
Your Critical Rate is reduced by 300, but Critical DMG increases by [150%->70%].
